title: Grimoire · Plot Type Selection
description: Extraction schema for plot-type-selection.md. Fields map to **Label:** fill-ins, tables, and checkbox groups in the template. Mark fields with x-source-required: true when the value should cite a source passage.

_source_text.description: Metadata about the source text being analyzed (fill in when using this template for book analysis).

what_data_from_your_story_sent_you_towar.description: What data from your story sent you toward this choice?

what_does_this_choice_cost_you.description: What does this choice cost you?

if_this_choice_turns_out_to_be_wrong_wha.description: If this choice turns out to be wrong, what would the signal be?
